northStar: The AI-engine pillar of WIFI DJ (wifidj.xyz). The lyrical process + the brain are the moat — not the video studio.
principles: no living-artist mimicry — influences are felt, never copied
assistant, not autopilot — the artist decides
real-AI and Web3 are opt-in, behind adapters/APIs, never bloating the free local core

livingState.note: One source of truth so nothing goes stale or gets left behind.
livingState.capture: IDEAS.md — the capture net; nothing the artist says is lost
livingState.spine: brain/roadmap.json — this file; indexes every item + the PR that shipped it
livingState.rule: Every PR updates the spine + TODO + IDEAS + README together. Shipping an item flips its status here and moves it to Shipped in TODO. A PR that skips this is not done.

phases.name: Living-state spine
phases.goal: A single machine-readable roadmap the /loop reads each iteration; keep all four tracking surfaces in lockstep.

phases.name: Measure & make it safe
phases.goal: Cheap, high-credibility foundation that makes everything after it measurable and responsible.

items.title: Eval harness + golden songs (npm run eval)
items.note: objective metrics (rhyme density, line diversity, thematic coherence, hook strength) over the demos+flagship golden set; regression guard in CI

items.title: Output-safety filter + short disclaimer/ToS
items.note: screens hooks/lyrics against a famous-phrase list → a 'famous-phrase' uniqueness flag; disclaimer in README + Uniqueness panel

items.title: One-command demo (npm run demo) — full song end-to-end
items.note: generates a full original song + prints the 11-region generation trace; lyrics-focused, no video; deterministic

items.title: LAUNCH.md kit (star checklist + Twitter thread + demo-recording script)
items.note: rewrote the stale video-first kit into a brain-first launch playbook: pre-flight checklist, demo-recording script, draft X thread, channel sequence (X → Show HN → Reddit → PH → YouTube), guardrails

phases.name: Deepen the visible brain
phases.goal: The lyrics/brain focus, made visible — the star magnet.

items.title: Cognitive model: first thought → second thought → decision
items.note: deliberate() runs 3 real critiques (true-to-brief / original / earns-it) → keep|revise; a '🧭 How the brain decided' readout on the lead hook

items.title: The Council — agents as a deliberating board
items.note: right hemisphere proposes / left challenges / artist decides; reuses agent findings + cognition deliberate(). The Crossroads Board made literal. Also added a .env* gitignore guard + .env.example (RUNWAY/ANTHROPIC placeholders) so a founder key can never be committed.

items.title: Brain-scan boot sequence + live per-agent drive
items.note: a scan-line boot sweep while running (reduced-motion aware) + regions/agents ignite in sequence live off the per-agent onProgress stream. COMPLETES PHASE 2.

items.title: Particle Brain + artist heat-map (living Brain Scan)
items.note: SHIPPED (founder idea): canvas particle layer over the SVG brain + a thermal heat-map; brainHeat() (tested) colors regions by artist type (right/generative=hot magenta, analytical=cyan, emotion raises temp, more 'becoming-you'=hotter). Reduced-motion aware. Header shows the artist type + brain temp. Feeds the Living-Brain dNFT.

phases.name: Make it yours (the living world)
phases.goal: The brain becomes the individual artist over time.

items.title: Create-your-own-artist v1 — an artist-identity file that becomes you
Pro Studio Rack — modular upgradeable engine 'boxes' (Pro Tools aesthetic)
items.note: FOUNDER: a DAW-style rack where each lyrical engine/agent is a swappable, upgradeable unit (free Local Combinator + locked Claude/Lightning 'upgrade' slots) on the existing LyricsProvider seam. $0 rack UI + free unit now; premium units founder-gated.

items.title: HERMES Studio workspace (Suno-Studio-style: section timeline + rack + meter bridge)
items.note: FOUNDER: implement a Suno-Studio-like pro workspace — a section/arrangement timeline (the song's [Intro]/[Verse]/[Hook] as clips) + the engine rack + the Brain Scan as the meter bridge. $0 read-only timeline now; clip editing later. Pairs with 3.3.

phases.name: Durability
phases.goal: Stop data loss; a cleared browser must never wipe a catalog.

phases.name: Real intelligence (opt-in)
phases.goal: The smallest real-AI increment that feels transformative; mock stays default so the core stays $0.

items.title: Rhyme/BPM validation loop on generated output

phases.name: Influence Studio (WIFI DJ framework Part 1)
phases.goal: Describe an influence (felt, never copied) → craft parameters.

items.title: Influence Studio — thematic cartography + lexical fingerprinting

ecosystem.note: Bigger initiatives that integrate with the engine via API — kept OUT of the free local core so it stays $0. Tracked here so they don't get lost; built when the founder greenlights.

crossroadsBoard.stage1: SHIPPED (#44): lib/hermes/crossroads.ts (openCrossing/vote/tally/leader/decide, pure+immutable) + brain/crossroads.json (3 seeded crossings) + tests. The $0/local decision model.
crossroadsBoard.what: The WIFI DJ governance + community steering surface — the brain's 'decision' region made social. The community and the agents meet at the crossroads to steer creative + ecosystem direction.
plan: 1. Board model (local-first, $0): brain/crossroads.json + lib/hermes/crossroads.ts — a data model of 'crossings' (a decision/fork: creative choice, persona/pack addition, direction). Each crossing has options, rationales, weighted votes, and an outcome. Versioned in git, same pattern as beliefs/personas.
2. The Board UI: a /crossroads route rendering active crossings — right-hemisphere proposals vs left-hemisphere challenges vs the artist's decision (shares the Council + Brain Scan aesthetic).
3. Signals → the brain: board decisions feed the taste/memory model (recordTaste) and can steer generation, exactly like Lyric Lab choices.
4. Community layer (opt-in, via API): proposals/votes sync to a backend (Supabase / Cloudflare D1); identity via email or wallet. No secrets in the core repo.

5. Web3 governance (later, via API): token-weighted voting / Solana / NFT membership steers the G-DJ. The Board is the on-ramp; the token layer plugs in through the API, never bloating the free local core.
crossroadsBoard.guardrail: Ships in stages; stages 1–3 are $0/local and live in this repo. Stages 4–5 are a separate service the core calls via API.

lightningAI.what: Per-agent compute for the opt-in 'advance your model' tier: a user signs up and gets their own agent; paid tiers give a bigger brain.
lightningAI.assessment: Great fit for the OPTIONAL GPU / 'bigger brain' lane and for prototyping per-agent compute — NOT the backbone. The base experience stays $0/local/serverless; the real prerequisite for 'their own agent' is an auth + DB layer (accounts + persistent vault), which is compute-light. Recommend testing Lightning as one opt-in provider behind the existing LyricsProvider seam, reversible and low-risk.
lightningAI.spike: When SSL is connected: stand up ONE Lightning Studio running a single HERMES agent behind an HTTPS endpoint; wire the app to call it as an opt-in provider. Compare against Anthropic API direct + Modal/Replicate for the same job before committing.
lightningAI.prerequisite: Accounts + persistent vault (see Phase 4 durability) — 'their own agent' needs identity + storage first.

livingBrainNft.nearTerm: SHIPPED (#45): lib/hermes/brainSignature.ts — brainSignature() → deterministic traits (dominant hemisphere, temperature, signature rhyme, songs made, becoming-you, primary emotion) + toNftMetadata() → standard ERC-721 metadata (name/description/image/animation_url/attributes). $0, no chain, no network — the exact JSON a token points to.
livingBrainNft.what: The particle brain as a DYNAMIC NFT that evolves as you create. tokenURI → metadata URL whose animation_url is the live Brain-Scan HTML + a snapshot image; traits = dominant hemisphere / temperature / top rhyme sound / songs-made / becoming-you% / primary emotion. Value = utility (unlocks compute tier + Crossroads votes + roles + radio/curation), evolving status/provenance, portable G-DJ identity, song royalties. NEAR-TERM $0 STEP (buildable, pairs with the Particle Brain): brainSignature() → deterministic traits + a stable metadata JSON + a shareable /brain/[id] render URL (no chain yet). Chain mint (Solana/Metaplex) = founder decision. Guardrail: free core stays free; utility/identity framing, not investment promises.

discordServer.what: Community server (preferred over Telegram) to learn-the-process + contribute. Plan: channels (#showcase/#help/#contributing/#song-drops), roles, voice listening parties, and a GitHub→Discord webhook posting commits/PRs/releases. Draft structure + wire the webhook on the founder's go-ahead; optional Telegram announce mirror later.

wifiDjRadio.what: A live radio streaming engine-made music; community submits + shapes; eventually each person runs their own agent.

token.what: Crossroads / Solana / token / NFT governance — funds the ecosystem, powers community steering; integrates via API.

perAgentCompute.what: See lightningAI — each agent on its own minimal compute, paid tiers to advance the model.

docsSite.what: Astro Starlight docs on GitHub Pages.

videoStudio.what: De-emphasized in the web app (focus on lyrics + brain). Code intact for the CLI; re-enable later.

runwayGen4.what: FOUNDER has a Runway Gen-4 API key + ~1000 credits (lots of 10s clips). Best uses (opt-in, key-gated, NEVER in the free core): (1) animate the agent avatars into living characters, (2) generate the HERMES Studio 'office/living world' scenes (agents get bodies), (3) a landing-page hero video, (4) real video-studio clips. Plan: a studio/runway.mjs adapter behind process.env.RUNWAY_API_KEY (key in .env.local, gitignored, NEVER committed; committed .env.example placeholder). I can scaffold the adapter $0 without the key; the founder runs it with their key. Actual generation = founder go-ahead + credits.
